description_long: This object consists of two stylized daisy-like flowers with white petals and yellow centers, each supported by a green, polygonal stem. The larger flower features a single, angular leaf protruding from its stem, while the smaller flower has a bare stem. The petals are arranged radially around the yellow disc, with each flower displaying a symmetrical, whorled pattern. The stems are straight and geometric, with the larger stem showing a distinct bend where the leaf attaches. The overall appearance is minimalistic and low-poly, with sharp edges and flat surfaces. The flowers evoke a cheerful, natural aesthetic suitable for parks, gardens, or roadside plantings in urban environments.
description: Two stylized daisy-like flowers with white petals, yellow centers, and green polygonal stems, one with a single angular leaf. The flowers have a minimalistic, geometric design and a cheerful, natural look.
description_view_0: Front view showing both flowers side by side, with the larger flower's leaf clearly visible and the petals radiating outward.
description_view_1: Angled view highlighting the overlapping petals and the relative height difference between the two flowers.
description_view_2: Rear view displaying the back of the flowers, with the leaf on the larger stem visible from a different angle.
description_view_3: Side view emphasizing the alignment of the stems and the spatial relationship between the two flowers, with the leaf partially obscured.
attribute_petal_arrangement: The petals are arranged in a radial, whorled configuration around the yellow disc center, with each petal evenly spaced and displaying clear radial symmetry typical of daisy flowers.
